pandoc 
  to: latex
  output-file: opt_manifolds.tex
  standalone: true
  pdf-engine: lualatex
  variables:
    graphics: true
    tables: true
    secnumdepth: 2
  default-image-extension: pdf
  number-sections: false
  
metadata
  documentclass: scrartcl
  classoption:
    - DIV=11
    - numbers=noendperiod
    - article
  papersize: letter
  header-includes:
    - '\KOMAoption{captions}{tableheading}'
    - '\usepackage{unicode-math, amsmath, amsfonts, amssymb, lmodern, fontspec, fontenc, babel, setspace}'
    - '\setmainfont{Latin Modern Mono}'
  block-headings: true
  title: Optimization on manifolds
  margin-left: 2.5cm
  margin-right: 2.5cm
  margin-bottom: 2.5cm
  margin-top: 2.5cm
  geometry:
    - top=2.5cm
    - left=2.5cm
    - right=2.5cm
    - bottom=2.5cm
  indent: true
  fontsize: 12pt
  number-depth: 2
  editor: visual
  bibliography:
    - references.bib
  csl: apa_7.csl
  mainfont: Latin Modern Roman
  sansfont: Latin Modern Mono
  monofont: Latin Modern Mono
  mathfont: Latin Modern Mono
  nocite: |
    @absil_2009
